zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Plaunche於大約1267年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，她的父親William de la Plaunche29歲，母親Alice23歲。她於1287年3月28日之前與John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年之後在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Plaunche于大约1267年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，她的父亲William de la Plaunche29岁，母亲Alice23岁。她于1287年3月28日之前与John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年之后在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Plaunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Plauché): variant of Plauchier, a nickname from Old Occitan plauchier ‘clumsy’.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Plaunche was born about 1267, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de la Plaunche, was 29 and her mother, Alice, was 23. She married John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert before 28 March 1287, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1309, in Warwickshire, England.

fr.Beaudesert Castle &amp; Manor, Henley-in: Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Plaunche est née environ 1267, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de la Plaunche, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert avant 28 mars 1287, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1309, à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Plaunche um 1267 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de la Plaunche 29 und ihre Mutter Alice 23. Sie hat vor 28. März 1287 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1309 in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Plaunche è nata il circa 1267 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de la Plaunche, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Alice, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert prima del 28 marzo 1287, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1309, nel Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Plauncheが約1267年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de la Plauncheは29歳，母Aliceは23歳であった。1287年3月28日以前にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでJohn De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Plaunche(이)가 대략 1267년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Plaunche(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1287년 3월 28일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 이후 영국 워윅실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Plaunche nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de la Plaunche, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert antes 28 de março de 1287, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1309, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Plaunche родилась около 1267 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de la Plaunche было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Montfort Baron Of Beaudesert перед 28 марта 1287 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1309 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия.
